name: SailPoint
description: SailPoint Identity Security Cloud (formerly IdentityNow) identity-governance sync via the REST API. Collects governed identities (→ human identities, with lifecycle state → Status, manager and identity profile) and optionally source accounts (→ non-human / uncorrelated identities) into XORCISM (IDENTITY), so the IGA system of record feeds the Identity & IAM inventory for orphaned/uncorrelated-account, stale and lifecycle-state detection. App-only auth (OAuth2 client credentials) — secrets from the worker environment: SAILPOINT_BASE_URL, SAILPOINT_CLIENT_ID, SAILPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET. API: https://developer.sailpoint.com/docs/api/.

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.help: Tenant API base, e.g. https://tenant.api.identitynow.com. Overrides SAILPOINT_BASE_URL.

parameters.name: include
parameters.help: Comma-separated object types to sync: identities, accounts (default: identities).

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.help: Maximum objects to pull per type (default 1000).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved SailPoint REST JSON export to parse instead of calling the API. Accepts {identities:[],accounts:[]} or a raw [...] / {items:[...]} array.
